task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: A new Layout Based Form is created with the correct ID and title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layout Based Forms administration screen shows a form with ID 'LBF_Neuro' and title/name 'Neurology Intake'.

task_completion.description: A group titled 'Reflexes' is added to the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'LBF_Neuro' form layout configuration, there is a group or section explicitly titled 'Reflexes'.

task_completion.description: Two text fields for reflexes are added to the group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Reflexes' group, there are two fields named 'Patellar Reflex' and 'Achilles Reflex', and their data types are set to text.

task_completion.description: The form and its fields are active and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes or status indicators show the form and fields are 'active' (or not disabled/inactive). There is evidence the form is saved, such as a success message or the form appearing in the list of existing Layout Based Forms.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface to create the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the LibreHealth EHR application, not a terminal or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database clients (like phpMyAdmin, DBeaver, or mysql CLI) are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The interface is the genuine LibreHealth EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The web page shows standard LibreHealth EHR navigation, menus, and layout administration elements, not a mock-up or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: LibreHealth EHR is a real open-source electronic health records system. Layout-Based Forms (LBF) is a feature in LibreHealth EHR for creating customizable clinical forms. The expected form ID is 'LBF_Neuro', title is 'Neurology Intake', group is 'Reflexes', and fields are 'Patellar Reflex' and 'Achilles Reflex' (which are real deep tendon reflexes). Verify these exact strings in the LibreHealth EHR Layout-Based Forms administration interface.
